github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use conventional commits (feat:, fix:, refactor:, docs:, chore:, test:). Scope is the affected app or package (e.g., feat(web):, fix(database):). First line max 72 characters, in English. Body optional, in English. If changes affect user-facing UI, note that text is in Spanish.

github.copilot.chat.pullRequestDescripti.text: Structure: ## Summary (1-3 bullet points), ## Changes (grouped by app/package affected), ## Test Plan (what to verify), ## Breaking Changes (if any). Write in English. In monorepos, list which apps/packages are affected.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Review for: security issues (exposed secrets, missing auth checks, SQL injection), performance (N+1 queries, missing memoization, large bundles), multi-tenancy (missing organizationId filters), Next.js patterns (await params, proper error responses), and Spanish UI text compliance.
